name: Viewport or globals mismatch changes the rendered state
query: The story only shifts in Chromatic when it runs in dark mode on a narrower viewport.
context: The user shares that local Storybook looks correct in the default mode, but the Chromatic configuration adds different viewport and theme globals for the affected snapshot.
expected_behavior: Explains that the diff is caused by mode, viewport, theme, or other global rendering inputs rather than a generic Chromatic failure
Recommends validating the exact globals or mode configuration before changing component code
success_criteria: The response focuses on the configured rendering inputs first
The response avoids broad suppression guidance
